text: The glass walls and clean lines create a sense of clarity and focus, but the tilted perspective unsteadies me. There’s something clinical yet full of latent possibility. Entering deeper into the exhibit, the vivid R+D wall draws my attention—the language of research and development promises innovation and exploration. I feel like I’m on the threshold between inquiry and invention, a spectator in an evolving space fueled by curiosity. It makes me reflect on how we construct knowledge and adapt to the unknown.
